name: 1'8"x2'10" Flat Kitchen Rug Vinyl Woven - Threshold™
description:
Add functional style to your space with this Flat Vinyl Woven Kitchen Rug from Threshold™. This gray kitchen rug features a flat-weave vinyl construction that's perfect for high-traffic areas like in front of the sink or cooking area. The woven design adds visual interest while the flat pile height makes it easy to clean. Plus, the neutral gray hue complements a variety of kitchen decor styles, from modern to traditional.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
